node.statement: (Recovery: Infinite-Dimensional Case → Weis-Shirokov). When A = B(H) for separable H, the main theorem recovers Weis-Shirokov Theorem 3: extreme points of energy-constrained density operator sets {ρ : Tr(H_j ρ) ≤ E_j, j=1,...,m} have rank r satisfying r² ≤ m+1. For m ≤ 2, this forces r = 1 (pure states). Our framework extends this to states on non-Type-I algebras, where the face structure is richer.
